$schema_note: Draft schema — adds 'featured', 'status', 'highlight'; drops 'diagramType' (Structurizr DSL owns diagram decisions now).

projects.description: A modular NixOS distribution. The platform everything else runs on.
projects.highlight: Declarative NixOS framework with 14 releases, running a 3-machine fleet daily.

projects.description: A persistent, customizable persona wrapper around Claude Code. Part of the Cairn ecosystem, but Cairn is not required.
projects.highlight: Personalized coding agent with file-based memory, per-user persona routing, and MCP tool integration. The agent that wrote this site.

projects.description: Universal MCP Gateway — aggregates MCP servers with REST, MCP HTTP transport, and OAuth2 authentication.
projects.highlight: Proxies multiple MCP servers behind one authenticated HTTP endpoint. REST + native MCP + dynamic OpenAPI for Open WebUI.

projects.description: Autonomous system operations and monitoring for NixOS hosts over Tailscale.
projects.highlight: Fleet-wide monitoring and remote ops for NixOS machines, glued together by Tailscale and exposed to AI agents via MCP.

projects.description: A DMS plugin for monitoring and managing Nix systems.
Self-hosted email with AI-powered classification using local LLMs.
Declarative CalDAV/CardDAV sync for NixOS with MCP integration.
Multi-user XMPP chat with an AI assistant, for household Cairn deployments.
Smart Intent Dispatcher — a local-first Home Assistant conversation agent for any OpenAI-compatible LLM.
MCP server for the Ultimate 64 series mainboards and cartridges.
Wayland-native viewer for Ultimate64 video/audio streaming. Decodes proprietary UDP packets with VIC-II color conversion.
Terminal emulator for the Commodore 64 aesthetic.
Nightly and Beta builds of Brave Browser packaged as Nix flakes.
NixOS package and module for OHF-Voice/linux-voice-assistant.
Orthodox Christian liturgical calendar, in your terminal.
Orthodox Christian business directory with a diner-placemat aesthetic.
Auto-updating engineering portfolio with GitHub discovery, Structurizr diagrams, and AI-drafted prose.

platform.description: NixOS distribution, packaging, and desktop integration.

ai.description: Agents, MCP servers, and tooling that bridges AI into real systems.

retro.description: Commodore 64 hardware bridged to modern Linux.
